## Is this a bug in the anti-pattern code, or a bug in the explanation?

- [ ] The code does not compile (this is a real bug — the code must compile)
- [ ] The code crashes in a way that is not instructive (segfault with no lesson is just noise)
- [ ] The header block explanation is wrong or misleading
- [ ] The "HOW TO FIX IT" section is itself wrong
- [ ] The build system is broken
- [ ] Other
